chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1310 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For orders on CMA No.6134/2021 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of main case 22-03-2022 Mr. Muhammad Sadiq Ansari, Advocate for the Petitioners..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- We have perused the memo of the Petition and the office objections, and firstly, it appears that this Court lacks territorial jurisdiction in the matter. Notwithstanding the same, it further appears that as per memo of the Petition, the Petitioners stand terminated and now seek reinstatement, which cannot be granted in this writ jurisdiction. In view of such position, the Petition is misconceived and is hereby dismissed with pending application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
